name: rockstarr-content
description: Rockstarr AI long-form content drafting plugin. Four publishing lanes (researched blog, thought leadership, email newsletter, LinkedIn newsletter) gated by the client's stack cadence, plus interview-driven case studies and repurposed derivatives. v0.7 removes the LinkedIn polls lane introduced in v0.6 — polls moved to the new rockstarr-social plugin where they fit alongside other short-form social content. v0.5 added the strategic content-planning layer: seo-strategy outputs a canonical backlog of 25-32 prioritized blog topics organized into 4-5 pillar+supporting clusters; ideate-topics + content-calendar + outline-blog are backlog-aware. Researched-blog lane (v0.4) runs WebSearch research + 13-item SEO/GEO checklist as Pass 1 before stop-slop. Thought-leadership lane (v0.3) runs the canonical TL rubric as Pass 1 before stop-slop. Every lane drafts in the client's approved voice from first-party KB; third-party sources are cited inline and listed in References, never paraphrased as the client's voice. Requires rockstarr-infra v0.8.2+ for the shared blog-seo-geo reference; v0.8.1+ for the TL rubric; v0.4+ for the rest.
